summary: Profile Edit feature testing complete. All backend APIs (PUT /api/auth/profile, POST /api/auth/avatar) and frontend UI working correctly for all 3 roles (Coach, Coachee, Admin).

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT /api/auth/profile correctly enforces role-based field restrictions (coach fields, coachee fields, admin only avatar)
Backend POST /api/auth/avatar validates image type and file size (max 5MB)
Frontend ProfileEditModal uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Name and Email are correctly locked with Lock icons for all roles
Coach profile shows 7 editable fields: title, location, experience, about, expertise (tags), domains (tags), certifications (tags)

Coachee profile shows 10 editable fields: job_title, department, designation, tier (select), location (select), business_unit, competency, date_of_joining (date), enrolment_type (select), reason_for_enrolment (textarea)
Admin profile shows only avatar upload option with helpful message
Save button calls PUT /api/auth/profile and refreshes user data via refreshUser()
Cancel button closes modal without saving changes
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed data in user profiles for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Edit feature fully tested. Demo login buttons work for all 3 roles. Profile modal opens from Navbar avatar dropdown 'My Profile' menu. Coach has 7 editable fields (text + tags), Coachee has 10 editable fields (text + select + date + textarea), Admin has only avatar upload. Name/Email locked for all roles. Save persists changes via PUT /api/auth/profile. Avatar upload via POST /api/auth/avatar. All data-testid attributes present: profile-edit-modal, profile-menu-btn, profile-save-btn, profile-cancel-btn, avatar-upload-btn, profile-field-{key}.

demo_login_buttons.admin_demo_login: PASS - Logs in and redirects to admin dashboard

coachee_profile_modal.select_fields: PASS - tier, location, enrolment_type are select dropdowns

admin_profile_modal.helper_message: PASS - Shows 'Click your photo to update your profile picture'

save_functionality.data_persists: PASS - Re-opening modal shows saved data
